Index

Documents: readme.md.

Modules: graphalg, graphalg/util.

API symbols

`$`:
  • graphalg: proc `$`(e: Edge; revArrow = false): string
  • graphalg: proc `$`(g: Graph): string
  • graphalg: proc `$`(s: SCC): string
  • graphalg: proc `$`(v: Vertex): string
add:
  • graphalg: proc add[D, M](g: Graph[D, M]; v: Vertex[D, M])
basis:
  • graphalg: proc basis[D, M](g: Graph[D, M]; edgeFilter: EdgeFilter[D, M] = default( EdgeFilter[D, M]); ## no filter vertexFilter: VertexFilter[D, M] = default(VertexFilter[D, M])): seq[ Vertex[D, M]]
basis=:
  • graphalg: proc basis=[D, M](g: Graph[D, M]; vlabel: openArray[string]; edgeFilter: EdgeFilter[ D, M] = default(EdgeFilter[D, M]); ## no filter vertexFilter: VertexFilter[D, M] = default(VertexFilter[D, M]))
bfs:
  • graphalg: iterator bfs(graph: Graph): Vertex[Graph.D, Graph.M]
  • graphalg: iterator bfs(anchor: Vertex): Vertex

  • graphalg: const BRUTE_VERTICES

  • graphalg: proc connectFrom[D, M](vto, vfrom: Vertex[D, M]; meta: M = default(M))

  • graphalg: proc connectTo[D, M](vfrom, vto: Vertex[D, M]; meta: M = default(M))

  • graphalg: Direction.dAll

  • graphalg: iterator dfs[D, M](graph: Graph[D, M]; edgeFilter: EdgeFilter[D, M] = default(EdgeFilter[D, M]); vertexFilter: VertexFilter[D, M] = default(VertexFilter[D, M]); undirected: bool = false): Vertex[D, M]
  • graphalg: iterator dfs[D, M](anchor: Vertex[D, M]; edgeFilter: EdgeFilter[D, M] = default(EdgeFilter[D, M]); vertexFilter: VertexFilter[D, M] = default(VertexFilter[D, M]); undirected: bool = false): Vertex[D, M]

EdgeFilter:
  • graphalg: type EdgeFilter

  • graphalg: iterator edges[D, M](g: Graph[D, M]; direction = dOutbound; filter: EdgeFilter[D, M] = default(EdgeFilter[D, M])): Edge[D, M]
  • graphalg: iterator edges[D, M](v: Vertex[D, M]; direction: Direction = dOutbound; filter: EdgeFilter[D, M] = default(EdgeFilter[D, M])): Edge[D, M]

  • graphalg: proc fas(g: Graph): HashSet[Edge[Graph.D, Graph.M]]

Filter:
  • graphalg: object Filter
flux:

  • graphalg: proc fluxd(v: Vertex): int

  • graphalg: type Graph
